description: Style NoteThe man of style always chooses his trousers with care, and scullers makes it easier with this classsy range of chinos. Designed with the choicest of fabrics, they make a perfect ensemble when paired with semi formal shirts and leather shoesProduct DetailsDark brown trousers with two insert pockets, two patch pockets at the back with buttoned closures, brand badge appliqued above the right back pocket, a comfortable waistband with loops, button and zipped closure on the front and extended hemsMaterial and Care100% cottonHand wash or machine wash cold with like colours using a mild detergentDo not bleachTumble dry lowWarm iron do not iron on decorationsSize and FitSlim fitThe model (height 6' and waist 32") is wearing a size 32
